title: Access violation error trying to insert into triggered view
bug_features_seed: CREATE VIEW fuzz_v AS SELECT a FROM fuzz_t;
CREATE PROCEDURE fuzz_v_ins(IN new_a INT) BEGIN INSERT INTO fuzz_t VALUES(new_a);
CREATE TRIGGER fuzz_v_ins BEFORE INSERT ON fuzz_v FOR EACH ROW CALL fuzz_v_ins(NEW.a);
key_bug_features: Insert operation on triggered view causes access violation
